Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 29 

TARG_CRITERIA_MET_DT 

LABEL: Date Part D Targeting Criteria Met 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date of the beneficiary met the specified targeting criteria for Medication Therapy 
Management (MTM) per CMS's Part D requirements 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from information
